session_note: S23: P0 (1v1 retest) deferred per user — has not yet tested with brother, will revisit after Voltkin works. P1 = Voltkin recipe rewrite. User playtest of S22 P4 geometric predicate revealed it's undiscoverable in natural play (200 px adjacency + aspect ratios with no visual feedback). User-driven spec: strict typed chain — linear bonded path of 8 prims SquareSquareSquareSquare->TriangleTriangleTriangleTriangle, first match in bond graph triggers, no filler prims allowed between consecutive chain entries (Circle/Line/Spiral/Dot bridges break the chain).

priorities.label: Voltkin recipe: replace geometric heuristic with strict SQ4-TR4 typed chain
priorities.check_method: voltkin.ts predicate rewritten: findVoltkinChain() does DFS path-finding from each Square prim, backtracking through bond graph to find a linear path of 8 prims matching SparkType.Square x4 then SparkType.Triangle x4. Removed findAllComponents+aspect-ratio classifier (no longer needed). VOLTKIN_RECIPE constants unchanged (cinematic mp4/voice ogg/sprite png paths, lumaKey threshold 0.88). Triggerer derivation unchanged (dominant placerColor across chain). voltkin.test.ts rewritten: 5 old tests -> 9 new covering empty world / only-squares / only-triangles / valid 8-chain / reverse-direction (bidirectional graph match, still triggers) / interleaved SQ-TR-SQ-TR null / Circle bridge null / branched topology with embedded chain match / multi-color triggerer dominance. typecheck exit 0; 425/425 tests pass (+4 from voltkin test rewrite); build green 447.90 KB (-0.30 KB from S22 baseline 448.20). Pushed to master, GH Actions auto-deploy in flight to spark-online.space. RALPH:PATROL inline self-check: predicate is pure read-only, registered via side-effect import unchanged, recipe contract unchanged, no integration changes needed. Bidirectional-match behavior validated by explicit reverse-direction test (the physical structure is symmetric — a TR4-SQ4 chain read from the other end is the same as SQ4-TR4).
